---
title: The Lab
description: A collection of interesting things I've worked on outside of my professional work experience.
listing:
  contents: 
    - the_lab
    - title: "Honours Thesis: Stochastic Volatility"
      description: "Research involving stochastic modelling to compare constant and stochastic volatility under geometric Brownian motion."
      date: 2023-05-19
      path: "https://www.researchgate.net/publication/372915363_Comparing_Stochastic_and_Constant_Volatility_Returns_Distributions_using_the_Heston_Model"
      image: "https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Harry-Zhong-3/publication/372915363/figure/fig7/AS:11431281179522663@1691236827788/Observed-vs-Theoretical-CDFs-2008-2022_W640.jpg"
      author: "Harry Zhong"
      categories: [R]
    - title: "Gender Classification CNN Demo"
      description: "A demo Shiny app that predicts the gender of an image using my custom trained convolutional neural network."
      date: 2025-02-22
      path: "https://harry2687-gender-cnn-demo.hf.space"
      image: "projects/gender-nn/cnn-layer.png"
      author: "Harry Zhong"
      categories: [Python]
  type: grid
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
---
